textByHash.37d5fc2a61f4a05873bf273ed249f1f412dccf70: Good work out there. You'd better speak to Elena and Councillor Halgrive, they'll go over the next steps with you.
textByHash.581f1a295afb057b09110f85f8b78be6a3bce006: You'd better speak to Elena, she'll fill you in on what's happening here.
textByHash.61fa2ec04ab70d093eba6dd594d12c064e16632d: Hello traveller. Do you need to go back over?
textByHash.82f060489fd5fe4ceacd69bd9b8a2ad65a6c21a0: There's not many doctors and nurses around here. You've got Nurse Sarah in West Ardougne and Doctor Orbon in East Ardougne but that's about it.
textByHash.bd852ecba9d39988996fdd440b92e3bf39e3d468: Welcome to West Ardougne friend. I'm Kilron. Let me know if you want to go back over the wall.
textByHash.c8eb909d54280c22fcf95b03dd371183e0a2f052: Okay, just give me the word.
textByHash.fecc93d0884add1931eb22e46c810523cb44612b: It's the most north eastern building in the city. Be careful around there.
